- #222 - fix: producer portal payout explanations and status consistency

normalization must be scoped to producer presentation and must not mutate ledger state."],"migration_effects":[],"config_effects":[],"test_surfaces":["bun --bun vitest run packages/core/tests/explanation-engine.test.ts","bun run test:producer-portal","bun --bun vitest run --config vitest.browser.config.ts tests/component/CreditedPlacements.test.tsx tests/component/PayoutStatement.test.tsx","bun run test:browser -- tests/e2e/stories/producer.stories.e2e.ts","bun run typecheck"],"coupling_risks":[{"surface":"Persisted explanation text","risk":"Changing only the explanation generator fixes new calculations but leaves existing and seeded records with raw UUID prose.","mitigation":"Apply the producer-facing formatter to both new and legacy explanation strings, and add an API fixture containing the legacy trace sentence."},{"surface":"Commission lifecycle status","risk":"Rewriting ledger status during a portal read could hide an upstream lifecycle bug and affect finance or analytics semantics.","mitigation":"Introduce a read-only producer presentation status derived from status plus hold fields; assert that the API handler performs no database mutation."},{"surface":"Demo seed lifecycle","risk":"Seed operations can release a hold without updating the explanation generated earlier, recreating contradictory demo cards.","mitigation":"Add a seeded producer story that asserts title, displayed status, net amount, and explanation agree for the retained-search scenario."},{"surface":"Confidential placements","risk":"Richer explanation formatting could reintroduce masked position or client details.","mitigation":"Keep explanation inputs financial and role-neutral, and retain API/component coverage that confidential placements display only the Confidential label."}],"spec_quality":"complete","open_questions":[],"parallel_safe":false} -->
